# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - api1.external.com
  - api2.external.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: route-external-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - api1.external.com
  - api2.external.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api1.external.com
      weight: 50
    - destination:
        host: api2.external.com
      weight: 50

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: route-external-db
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  tcp:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: db.external.com
